summary.en: Practice NetworkPolicies, Service endpoint troubleshooting, and Ingress exposure.
summary.fr: Pratique NetworkPolicies, depannage d'endpoints Service, et exposition Ingress.

title.en: Allow only the frontend to reach the API
title.fr: Autoriser seulement le frontend vers l'API

hint.en: NetworkPolicy api-allow-frontend must select app=api and allow ingress from pods labeled app=frontend on TCP port 80.
hint.fr: NetworkPolicy api-allow-frontend doit selectionner app=api et autoriser l'ingress depuis les Pods app=frontend sur TCP 80.

title.en: Fix a Service with no endpoints

hint.en: Compare kubectl get pods --show-labels with kubectl get svc svc-api -o yaml. The selector is wrong.
hint.fr: Compare kubectl get pods --show-labels avec kubectl get svc svc-api -o yaml. Le selector est faux.

hint.en: Create Ingress ckad-web host ckad.localhost path / pathType Prefix backend service ingress-web port 80.
hint.fr: Cree Ingress ckad-web host ckad.localhost path / pathType Prefix backend service ingress-web port 80.
